properties.Name: Police HQ Wan Chai
properties.Description: Main police headquarters — command centre for protest response

properties.Name: Central Police Station
properties.Description: Historic central station — front line enforcement during marches

properties.Name: Mong Kok Police Station
properties.Description: Key Kowloon enforcement node — heavy deployment during Mong Kok clashes

properties.Name: Tsim Sha Tsui Police Station
properties.Description: Tourist district policing — frequent baton charges in 2019

properties.Name: Sha Tin Police Station

properties.Name: NSL Core Enforcement Zone
properties.Description: After June 2020 public protest criminalized under National Security Law. CCTV monitoring intensified.

properties.Name: CCTV Dense Zone Central
properties.Description: Highest concentration of surveillance cameras in Hong Kong

properties.Name: CCTV Dense Zone Mong Kok
properties.Description: Dense commercial area with extensive camera network

properties.Name: CCTV Dense Zone Tsim Sha Tsui
properties.Description: Tourist and transit hub — heavy CCTV presence
